title: monardella linoides subsp. oblonga
intro: Monardella linoides subsp. oblonga, also known as pine mint or narrowleaf desert honeysuckle, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Monardella linoides subsp. oblonga include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. Monardella linoides subsp. oblonga can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
